item.title: Communication
item.description: Thought for the Day I was thinking about a very ubiquitous topic that I like to explore more about - the topic of communication. Whether it be my curiousity about the origins of writing, or fascination with old/dead languages, I always like to think of language as a tool - a tool for communicating with others. It is true that attaining a certain level of proficiency at weilding this tool leads to a lot of opportunities.
